overview: Aditya Pharmacy College at Surampalem, formerly Aditya Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research, commenced from the academic year 2004-2005. The official site highlights B.Pharmacy, Pharm.D, and M.Pharmacy study options, residential campus support, and an active academic environment with GPAT coaching, seminars, and industry interaction.
accreditation: NAAC accredited; affiliated to JNTUK; approved by AICTE; approved by PCI; approved by UGC under Section 2(f); ISO-certified status is also highlighted on the official site.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Fee not stated on surfaced official pages
Fee not stated on surfaced official pages
Fee not stated on surfaced official pages

admissions.admissionProcess: The AP EAMCET counseling stream covers B.Pharmacy admissions under college code APCS. The official site separately publishes course updates and events for Pharm.D and postgraduate students as part of the same campus.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAMCET counseling schedules are announced by APSCHE each cycle, while Aditya Pharmacy College posts institutional updates and examination notices on its website.

campus.specialNote: The official about page notes GPAT coaching support and says distinguished scientists from Hetero Drugs, Shantha Biotech, Dr. Reddy's, and Aurobindo Pharma visit the college for lectures and seminars.

contact.address: Aditya Nagar, ADB Road, Surampalem - 533437, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh, India
